creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 251071
diff file for update to 1.40.3.8502

multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass: Update to 1.40.3.8502

* New release from plex.tv

 Changelog:

  https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/625

   NEW:
    (Auto Update) 32 bit installations of Plex Media Server
     running on 64 bit windows will be upgraded to 64 bit
     installations via auto update.
    (Web) Updated to 4.129.1

   FIXES:
    (Analysis) Analysis of items would be performed for chapter
     thumbs even if chapter thumb generation was disabled.
    (Analysis) Slow DB queries caused analysis to be slow to start.
    (GPU) Server would crash on startup if a user was running
     windows with Nvidia drivers installed but no Nvidia GPU.
    (History) Grandparent title and guid could get reversed.
    (Smart Collections) DB Optimize would make smart collections
     un-editable.

 QA:

  portlint OK (0 fatal errors)
